items.name: theme
items.title: QuantyFin theme
items.description: Canonical theme (shadcn shape): semantic role tokens aliased onto the QuantyFin palette + tokenized type scale. Source of raw values: colors_and_type.css (:root + 4 surface adapters). Roles mapped to utilities via @theme inline in tailwind/globals.css.

items.name: components
items.title: QuantyFin components
items.description: The universal component layer (@apply + tokens): buttons, typography, forms, overlays, identity, data-viz, state. No-Preflight bundle to inline under the no-build CDN; build mode uses tailwind/quantyfin.tailwind.css as the entry.
items.docs: Component classes: .btn (+7 variants ×3 sizes) · .field/.input/.select/.checkbox/.radio/.toggle · .modal/.drawer/.toast/.tip/.popover · .avatar/.badge/.chip/.tag · KPI/sparkline/progress/charts · skeleton/empty/error/banner · .type-* utilities. Sizes resolve from [data-surface].

items.name: kit-app
items.title: App Kit
items.description: Composite back-office/PLM blocks: app shell · top-bar · side-rail · tabs · data-table · filter-bar · command palette · chart engine. Token-driven, Tailwind-enabled.

items.name: kit-ai
items.title: AI Kit
items.description: AI vocabulary blocks: prompt · suggestion chip · halo · confidence chip · generation states · review/diff · disclosure. Marks AI vs human work (iris + ✦ glyph + halo).

items.name: kit-collab
items.title: Collab Kit
items.description: Multiplayer layer: comment thread · mention · annotation pin · approval card/stack · activity feed · version row · presence cursor · role badges.

items.name: kit-fashion
items.title: Fashion Kit (scoped)
items.description: Fashion-domain blocks: color/material swatch · pantone chip · season tag · size matrix · measurement diagram · BOM table · style card · lookbook tile · tech-pack A4. Domain-scoped, not universal.

items.name: utils
items.title: cn() utility
items.description: Tailwind-aware className merge (clsx + tailwind-merge). Required by all React components.

items.name: button
items.title: Button (React)
items.description: Open-code React Button (Tier 3) — CVA variants default/secondary/outline/ghost/link/destructive/gold ×4 sizes, Radix Slot for asChild. quantyFin-branded via role tokens; pill radius. Demo: preview/components/react.html.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge (React)
items.description: Open-code React Badge (Tier 3) — CVA variants incl. QuantyFin status (live/build/plan/gap), Radix Slot for asChild. Demo: preview/components/react.html.

items.name: input
items.title: Input (React)
items.description: Open-code React Input — role tokens (border-input, ring-ring, aria-invalid), rounded-lg. Demo: preview/components/react.html.

items.name: label
items.title: Label (React)
items.description: Open-code React Label on Radix Label primitive.

items.name: card
items.title: Card (React)
items.description: Open-code React Card composition (Card/Header/Title/Description/Content/Footer) — bg-card + border-border surface. Demo: preview/components/react-radix.html.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch (React)
items.description: Open-code React Switch on Radix Switch primitive — checked = bg-primary. Interactive demo: preview/components/react-radix.html.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog (React)
items.description: Open-code React Dialog on Radix Dialog primitive — overlay, content, header/footer/title/description, close. Interactive demo: preview/components/react-radix.html.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs (React)
items.description: Open-code React Tabs on Radix Tabs primitive — list/trigger/content, active = bg-background. Interactive demo: preview/components/react-radix.html.
